public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as registrar.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a registrar still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of registrar in and around Nomdara Council of Elders, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Nomdara Council of Elders workable through the obligations of registrar while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep records, witness, or account integrity credible while people try to hurry, blur, or weaponize the paper trail. Around Nomdara Council of Elders, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of registrar visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Jalen Waycord can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Jalen Waycord needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Nomdara Council of Elders.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Jalen Waycord communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara Council of Elders: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
